main_process.architecture: Effect.runFork(main) — initialization orchestrated as an Effect program

lifecycle.startup: app.whenReady() → lock check → preferAppEnv → overlay → mainEffect
lifecycle.second_instance: app.on(second-instance) → show/focus main window (single-instance lock enforced)

preload_scripts.context_bridge: contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld('api', api) at src/preload/index.ts:142 — SINGLE exposure, all renderer IPC goes through window.api.*

renderer.i18n: 17 locales in src/renderer/i18n/ (ar, br, bs, da, de, en, es, fr, ja, ko, no, pl, ru, uk, zh, zht + index.ts registry)
key_renderer_files: src/renderer/index.tsx (426 lines) — Sentry init, i18n, deep links, plugin loading, dialog setup
src/renderer/plugin-transport.ts (43 lines) — creates plugin transport bridge

sidecar_entry.build_bundling: Separate rollup input in electron-vite config: { index: 'src/main/index.ts', sidecar: 'src/main/sidecar.ts' }
sidecar_entry.module_system: ESM — uses dynamic import('virtual:opencode-server') to load the actual server code

targets.main: ESM, bundled via rollup, externalizeDeps includes @lydell/node-pty platform-specific package
targets.preload: CJS, bundled via rollup, single input: src/preload/index.ts
targets.renderer: SolidJS app via Vite, sourcemap enabled, Sentry sourcemap upload

build_system.sentry: Conditional — only when SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN, SENTRY_ORG, SENTRY_PROJECT env vars are set
build_system.server_assets: WASM files copied from ../opencode/dist/node/ to out/main/chunks/ during build

spawn_mechanism.api: Electron utilityProcess.fork(sidecar.js, [], { cwd, env, serviceName: 'opencode server', stdio: 'pipe' })
spawn_mechanism.entry_resolution: join(dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)), 'sidecar.js') — sidecar.js is colocated with main/index.js in out/main/
spawn_mechanism.service_name: opencode server (used for child-process-gone event filtering)

communication.mechanism: parentPort.postMessage (utilityProcess IPC) — NOT stdio, NOT HTTP, NOT WebSocket

main_to_sidecar: { type: 'start', hostname, port, password, userDataPath, needsMigration } — sent via child.postMessage()
{ type: 'stop' } — sent when killing sidecar or app quit
sidecar_to_main: { type: 'migration-progress', progress: StorageMigrationProgress } — SQLite migration percentage

communication.stdio: Pipe (child.stdout/stderr) — forwarded to onStdout/onStderr callbacks, optional

lifecycle.start_timeout: 60 seconds (SIDECAR_START_STALL_TIMEOUT) — if no 'ready' message within 60s, kill and reject
lifecycle.stop_timeout: 6 seconds (SIDECAR_STOP_TIMEOUT) — if no exit within 6s after 'stop' command, force kill
lifecycle.health_check: HTTP GET to {url}/global/health with basic auth (username: opencode), 3s timeout, retries every 100ms until healthy
lifecycle.crash_handling: onExit handler → deferred exit promise; child-process-gone event listener (filtered by serviceName). Crash before 'ready' message → reject with 'Sidecar exited before ready with code X'
lifecycle.restart: No automatic restart. If sidecar dies, the main process must be re-launched (app.relaunch + app.exit). No watcher/auto-reconnect mechanism.

startup_sequence: 3. useSystemCertificates — loads system + default CA certificates via tls.setDefaultCACertificates
5. dynamic import('virtual:opencode-server') — loads the actual Opencode server (Database, Log, Server)
7. Server.listen({ port, hostname, username, password, cors: ['oc://renderer'] })

environment.sanitization: process.env sanitized via sanitizeEnv() from env-blocklist.ts — strips 28 sensitive env vars
environment.sidecar_specific: DEBUG and LD_PRELOAD (linux) are explicitly deleted from sidecar env
environment.passed_vars: OPENCODE_SERVER_USERNAME, OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD, XDG_STATE_HOME, and all non-blocked parent process env vars

kill_sidecar_ipc.handler: ipc-init.ts:48 → delegates to deps.killSidecar() → indexed.ts:92 killSidecar() → sidecar.listener.stop()
kill_sidecar_ipc.used_in: app quit, app relaunch, update install

registry.canonical: src/main/ipc-channels.ts — IPC handle (63 channels), IPC send (5), IPC push (7), IPC store (5 namespaces)
registry.contract: src/main/ipc-contract.ts — IpcHandleContract + IpcSendContract define params/returns for every channel. Compile-time assertion ensures no orphan channels.
registry.bridge: src/preload/index.ts — contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld('api', api) maps every IPC channel to a typed method

store.backend: electron-store — persistent JSON storage under userData directory

plugin_transport.pattern: Dynamic sub-channel routing — main channel is static, sub-channel is runtime-defined by plugin

capabilities.returns: { github, plugins, mcp, shellOpen, clipboardImage, notifications }

type_safety.contract: IpcHandleContract interface defines params/returns for all 63 handle channels
type_safety.compile_assertion: Coverage check ensures every IPC.handle key has a contract entry and vice versa
type_safety.result_envelope: All handle channels return IpcResult<T> = { ok: true; value: T } | { ok: false; error: { message, stack? } }
type_safety.validation: scripts/validate-ipc-migration.ts ensures no raw string literals for IPC channels

ipc_channels.design_observation: ipc-init.ts uses clean Deps interface pattern for dependency injection (testable). Other IPC modules directly import their dependencies (not testable without Electron mocking).

creation.state_persistence: electron-window-state — saves/restores x, y, width, height
creation.show_on_create: false — shown on 'ready-to-show' event (splash screen pattern)
creation.permissions: allowRendererPermissions — sets up custom oc:// protocol, file:// access via registerFileProtocol, registerHttpProtocol

windows.overlay: titleBarOverlay with computed color based on nativeTheme (dark/light)

titlebar.linux: default native window frame (no custom titlebar)
titlebar.theme_api: setTitlebar(win, { mode: 'light'|'dark' }) — updates title bar overlay color
titlebar.theme_source: Derived from nativeTheme.shouldUseDarkColors and custom background color setting

zoom.persistence: Per-window zoom factor stored and restored via getStore
zoom.pinch_zoom: Configurable — get/set via IPC, persisted to electron-store
zoom.push_events: On zoom change → webContents.send(ZOOM_FACTOR_CHANGED, factor) → all windows notified
zoom.resize_constraints: None enforced — zoom factor is unbounded

crash_recovery.wireWindowRecovery: Sets up renderer crash/unresponsive handling per window at src/main/windows.ts:185
crash_recovery.unresponsive_sampling: createUnresponsiveSampler (src/main/unresponsive.ts) — samples JS call stack every 1s for 15s. Logs top stacks when renderer hangs.
crash_recovery.safe_mode: transitionToSafeMode(win, error) — creates new BrowserWindow pointing to safe-mode route with diagnostic data. Closes crashed window.
crash_recovery.render_process_gone: Handles 'render-process-gone' event with detailed reason logging

multi_window.secondary_windows: No explicit secondary data windows found. Safe mode creates a replacement window. Update prompt uses dialog.showMessageBox.
multi_window.overlay_window: Optional — overlay BrowserWindow used during startup (migration progress display). Closed after initialization.

protocol_handlers.deep_links: app.on('open-url') on macOS, process.argv on Windows/Linux — opencode:// scheme

scripts.build: electron-vite build — bundles main, preload, renderer to out/

native_modules.prebuild: bun install --cwd native — builds native Node addon (mac_window.node)
native_modules.node_pty: @lydell/node-pty (platform-specific optionalDeps). Electron-vite plugin resolves import to platform-specific package. Externalized in rollup (not bundled).
native_modules.parcel_watcher: Platform-specific optionalDeps — resolved at runtime by the server

win.signing: Custom PowerShell script (script/sign-windows.ps1) — only in GITHUB_ACTIONS

icons.dev: Scripts/copy-icons.ts — copies icons from resources/ for specific channel

files: src/main/index.ts (445 lines) — main entry: init orchestration, sidecar lifecycle, deep links, migration, window creation
src/main/sidecar.ts (169 lines) — sidecar process: parentPort IPC, server startup, env setup, certificates, proxy
src/main/server.ts (259 lines) — sidecar spawn/stop/health-check, utilityProcess management
src/main/windows.ts (473 lines) — BrowserWindow creation, theme, zoom, titlebar, permissions, crash recovery
src/main/ipc-channels.ts (109 lines) — canonical IPC channel registry (63 handle + 5 send + 7 push + 5 store)
src/main/ipc-contract.ts (459 lines) — typed IPC contract: IpcHandleContract, IpcSendContract, typedInvoke/typedSend helpers
src/main/ipc.ts (53 lines) — central IPC registration aggregator + push helpers
src/main/ipc-init.ts (121 lines) — init/server/update/safe-mode IPC handlers (Deps DI pattern)
src/main/ipc-window.ts (81 lines) — window state/zoom/focus/titlebar/menu IPC handlers
src/main/ipc-store.ts (71 lines) — electron-store CRUD IPC handlers
src/main/ipc-fs.ts (88 lines) — file pickers, open path, clipboard, notifications IPC handlers
src/main/ipc-config.ts (110 lines) — custom agents, MCP servers, plugin config IPC handlers
src/main/ipc-session.ts (60 lines) — session export/import IPC handlers
src/main/ipc-git.ts (50 lines) — git status IPC handler
src/main/ipc-capabilities.ts (40 lines) — desktop capabilities IPC handler
src/main/ipc-locale.ts (30 lines) — locale preference IPC handlers
src/main/github-ipc.ts (145 lines) — GitHub OAuth PKCE flow + API proxy IPC
src/main/store.ts (25 lines) — electron-store factory with lazy init and caching
src/main/constants.ts (24 lines) — channel detection, app IDs, updater toggle, store keys
src/main/logging.ts (195 lines) — electron-log setup, crash reporter, net log, export debug logs
src/main/apps.ts (157 lines) — macOS/Linux app detection, Windows app path resolution, WSL path conversion
src/main/shell-env.ts (155 lines) — user shell detection, shell env loading (bash/zsh/fish/nushell), parsing
src/main/env-blocklist.ts (28 lines) — sanitizeEnv: strips 28 sensitive env vars
src/main/migrate.ts (85 lines) — Tauri SQLite → Opencode migration
src/main/menu.ts (50 lines) — native menu creation (app, file, edit, view, window, help)
src/main/menu-action-registry.ts (40 lines) — MenuActionRegistry class for action dispatching
src/main/desktop-menu-actions.ts (30 lines) — desktop menu action dispatch
src/main/unresponsive.ts (70 lines) — renderer unresponsive call-stack sampler
src/main/updater.ts (133 lines) — auto-updater setup, check, download, install
src/main/platform-config.ts (140 lines) — ElectronPlatformPaths and BrowserPlatformPaths classes implementing PlatformPaths interface
src/preload/index.ts (143 lines) — contextBridge API exposure, all typed IPC wrappers, listener management
src/preload/types.ts (200 lines) — shared types: InitStep, SafeModeAction, ElectronAPI, AgentDef, McpServerEntry, PluginConfigEntry, GitCheck, DesktopCapabilities, etc.
src/renderer/safe-mode.tsx (97 lines) — safe mode recovery UI
src/renderer/plugin-context.tsx (82 lines) — SolidJS plugin context provider
src/renderer/i18n/index.ts (194 lines) — i18n registry with 17 locale files

test_files.description: IPC contract coverage: channel completeness assertion, CHANNELS namespace validation, IpcResult type tests
Input validation: agents, MCP servers, plugin configs filtering, edge cases
GitHub OAuth PKCE flow unit tests + mock-electron handler registration (28KB, most comprehensive)
HTML output validation: relative paths, no web manifest, Vite publicDir resolution
IPC channel name consistency for plugin transport
ElectronAPI exposes 4 plugin transport methods with correct signatures
createPluginTransport: 5 methods, prefixing, collision prevention, noop fallback

test_utilities.electron_mock: src/test-utils/electron-mock.ts (234 lines) — comprehensive Electron mock factory (ipcMain, BrowserWindow, app, dialog, shell, etc.)
test_utilities.mock_pattern: mock.module() before dynamic import — intercepts electron before module graph resolves

critical: No renderer component tests (SolidJS components untested)
No window lifecycle tests (windows.ts: 473 lines, 0 tests)
No server/sidecar integration tests (server.ts: 259 lines, 0 tests)
No IPC handler integration tests beyond github-ipc (ipc-init.ts, ipc-fs.ts, ipc-window.ts, etc.)
No e2e tests (no Playwright, Spectron, or WebDriverIO)
coverage_gaps.pattern_concern: .gitkeep files exist in all three __tests__/ directories — scaffolding for tests that were never written

findings.description: 30+ instances of sync file I/O in main process — blocks event loop. Key hotspots: logging.ts exportDebugLogs (reads/writes many files synchronously), ipc-session.ts (writeFileSync/readFileSync inside IPC handlers), ipc-fs.ts (sync file operations).
Zero end-to-end tests for the Electron app. No Playwright, Spectron, or WebDriverIO. Only 8 unit/compile-time tests exist.
Sidecar has no automatic restart mechanism. If it crashes, the user must restart the entire app. No watcher, no auto-reconnect, no retry logic in the main process.
26 console.* statements in production code. IPC config handlers duplicate logging (console.error + re-throw). Shell env probing logs verbosely on every failure.

24 'any' type usages across the codebase. 6 in production code: window.ts upsertKeyValue, server.ts mutable error augmentation, renderer/plugin-transport.ts window.api access, github-ipc.ts JSON deserialization. 2 empty catch blocks (swallowed errors).

IPC contract (ipc-contract.test.ts) and GitHub OAuth (github-ipc.test.ts) are well-tested, but all other IPC modules, sidecar, windows, updater, and renderer components have zero test coverage. .gitkeep stubs signal intent without execution.

Pervasive process.env mutation — 10+ instances across server.ts, sidecar.ts, index.ts. No centralized config layer. Sidecar env is sanitized but main process env is freely mutated via Object.assign and direct assignment.

pre_existing_findings.finding: safeInvoke imported at packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts:4 but never called — dead code import

dependency_graph.core_import_flow: index.ts → ipc.ts → all ipc-*.ts modules → ipc-channels.ts (constants only, zero imports from desktop/)
dependency_graph.no_circular_imports: Module graph flows strictly: ipc-channels (leaves) → ipc-contract → ipc-* modules → ipc.ts → index.ts

smoking_guns.title: Sidecar crash = full app restart
smoking_guns.detail: The sidecar/server process has no automatic restart mechanism. If it crashes, the main process does not attempt to respawn it. The only recovery path is app.relaunch() + app.exit(0). The 60-second timeout on startup is the only guard. A crashed sidecar mid-session requires the user to manually restart the entire app.

smoking_guns.title: Thin test coverage disguised as typed safety
smoking_guns.detail: The IPC channel registry and contract system is exceptionally well-typed (compile-time assertions, exhaustive contracts), but only 2 of 16 IPC handler modules have runtime tests. The contract guarantees type alignment but cannot verify behavioral correctness, error handling, or integration behavior. 3 .gitkeep files in __tests__/ directories signal intention without execution.

smoking_guns.title: Main process is a monolithic index.ts with 445 lines of orchestration
smoking_guns.detail: src/main/index.ts handles: process error handlers, lock files, XDG setup, Sentry init, logging init, crash reporter, auto-updater setup, deep link handling, proxy configuration, database migration, sidecar spawning, health checks, window creation, menu creation, native module init, and IPC handler registration. The IPC layer is well-factored, but the orchestration layer remains monolithic. Effect.runFork(main) centralizes the startup sequence but the main function itself is >300 lines.

smoking_guns.title: Pre-existing dead import in preload
smoking_guns.detail: safeInvoke imported at src/preload/index.ts:4 but never called. This was previously recorded as a finding (ses_1840f2a6) and appears unresolved.

conventions_observed.ipc_registration: All IPC handlers registered through registerIpcHandlers(deps) → delegates to per-module register*IpcHandlers functions
conventions_observed.error_handling: IpcResult<T> envelope for all handle channels: { ok: true; value } | { ok: false; error: { message, stack?, component? } }
conventions_observed.preload_pattern: typedInvoke()/typedSend() wrappers imported from ipc-contract.ts — no raw ipcRenderer calls in preload
conventions_observed.logger: electron-log (wrapped in src/main/logging.ts with write/export/tail helpers)
conventions_observed.config: electron-store with reserved namespace keys (IPC.store.*), lazy init with path-guard (post setPath)
conventions_observed.build_tooling: electron-vite for dev/build, electron-builder for packaging, bun for scripts and tests
